title: Inventory Highlighter (HighlightRender)
description: Highlights items in your inventory 🎒 with different colors 🌈 THE FIRST remake of “Highlighter” 🔄 based on type and enchantments ✨. for newer versions 🆕, fully customizable ⚙️ with adjustable colors 🎨, rules 📏, and highlighting 🔍.
body:
# HighlightRender | Inventory Highlighter

Quickly find important items in your inventory with customizable colored highlights.

HighlightRender visually marks items based on:
- Item type
- Enchantments
- Custom rules

Perfect for:
- ⚔️ PvP
- 📦 Inventory sorting
- 💎 Rare item management
- ⛏️ Survival gameplay

---

## Features

- 🎨 Custom highlight colors
- 🧩 Custom rules for items and enchantments
- ⚡ Lightweight and optimized
- 🔧 Easy to configure
- 🆕 Supports modern Minecraft versions

---

## Remake of “Highlighter”

HighlightRender is a modern remake of the original “Highlighter” mod by themasterkitty, updated for newer Minecraft versions with improved performance, customization, and compatibility.

---

## Fully Customizable

Configure highlights exactly how you want:
- Different colors for different item types
- Special highlighting for enchanted items
- Custom item rules
- Adjustable behavior and priorities

---

## Preview

---

# Modpack Permission

You are free to use this mod in:
- ✅ Public modpacks
- ✅ Private modpacks
- ✅ Servers with friends
- ✅ Modpacks uploaded to Modrinth or CurseForge

Please do not:
- ❌ Reupload the mod itself
- ❌ Claim the mod as your own
